'''Typtus of the 33rd Egg''' was a [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] aristocrat of the [[Gehenbar hive/Legends|Gehenbar hive]]. Named after the famed Gehenbar leader [[Typtus the First]], he aimed to bring back the glory of his namesake. As his name suggested, he was born from the 33rd egg in his crèche, considered to be a lucky number by Geonosians.

Typtus planned to assault Gehenbar's rival, the [[Stalgasin hive/Legends|Stalgasin hive]], and demolish its spire's foundations.
